heading: geometry Examples
body:
***

➤ Use the **Select your language** drop-down menu on this page to
set the language of the examples in this section.

***

The following MongoDB Search query uses the `geoWithin` operator with the
`geometry` field to search for properties in Hawaii. The `type` field
specifies whether the area is a GeoJSON [Polygon](manual/reference/geojson) or
[MultiPolygon](manual/reference/geojson).

The query includes a:

- [$limit](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/limit) stage to limit the output to `3` results.

- [$project](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/project) stage to
  exclude all fields except `name` and `address`.

> **Note:** You don't need to specify indexes named `default` in your MongoDB Search
> query. If your index has any other name, you must specify the
> `index` field.
